title: Auto Insurance Claim Frequency Modeling
subtitle: Statistical modeling project on driver age and insurance claim frequency
description: Analyzed simulated auto insurance policyholder data to evaluate how driver age relates to claim frequency using Python, feature engineering, statistical tests, and count-regression models.
role: Data cleaning, preprocessing, feature engineering, reproducible workflow organization
highlights: Generated and cleaned a 10,000-record synthetic auto insurance dataset
Engineered age groups and mileage categories for model interpretability
Compared claim frequency patterns across driver age groups
Organized notebooks, scripts, outputs, and documentation for GitHub
